ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the store's location */,
  "store_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the store (latitude and longitude) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the store */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email address for the store */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "manager_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the store manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the store manager */,
  "store_open_date" TEXT /* Date the store opened */,
  "store_status" TEXT /* Current status of the store (e.g., open, closed, under renovation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person at the vendor */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the primary contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the vendor is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the vendor is located */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the vendor's location */,
  "vendor_type" TEXT /* Type of vendor (e.g., wholesaler, distributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "pack_type" TEXT /* Packaging type of the product */,
  "liter_size" INTEGER /* Liter size of the product */,
  "state_btl_cost" REAL /* State bottle cost of the product */,
  "btl_price" REAL /* Bottle price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., tequila, scotch, whiskey) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "alcohol_content" REAL /* Alcohol by volume (ABV) percentage */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the product is produced */,
  "ingredients" TEXT /* List of main ingredients */,
  "allergens" TEXT /* List of potential allergens */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the product */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Current status of the product (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor supplying the product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "bottle_qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of bottles sold */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the sale */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Time of the sale transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card, debit card) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer (if available) */,
  "customer_age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the customer (e.g., 18-25, 26-35) */,
  "customer_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (e.g., male, female) */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied to the sale */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax applied to the sale */,
  "total_with_tax" REAL /* Total cost of the sale including tax */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)
